The '''''Minestra''''' was a captured [[Imperial Customs Corvette]] that was part of [[Drea Renthal]]'s pirate fleet. It was upgraded with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] in addition to its standard [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] armament. The ''Minestra'' was actually slightly better armed than Renthal's flagship, ''[[Renthal's Fist]]''. It was instrumental in the smugglers' victory at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]], helping to disable the [[Renthal's Vigilance|''Vigilance'']], which would later be repaired and incorporated into Renthal's fleet, at the onset of the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
